message:
test(unit+proptest): expand tailer, survival, tantivy_reindex, watchdog, bloom_filter tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Inline unit test expansion across five modules as part of the wa-1u90p.7.1
test coverage campaign.

tailer.rs (~500 new lines):
- TailerConfig: custom field construction, clone behavior.
- TailerMetrics/SupervisorMetrics: field mutation, default values.
- PaneTailer: initial should_poll, had_changes tracking, backoff
  multiplier=1.0 keeps interval, backoff caps at max_interval,
  reset-on-activity returns to min_interval, poll count increments.
- DeltaEvent variants: New/Changed/Overflow construction and field access.
- Supervisor: start/stop tracking, pane sync lifecycle, metrics reset,
  zero-max-concurrent clamps to 1, overlap_size propagation.
- TailerHealth: zero-pane baseline, multi-pane dirty aggregation.

survival.rs (~520 new lines):
- Covariates: names(), dot with zero beta, default is all zeros, to_array
  roundtrip, negative values, large values.
- WeibullParams: default values, custom construction, clone.
- SurvivalModel: baseline hazard with shape>1 increasing over time,
  shape=1 constant hazard (exponential), zero covariates neutral,
  negative covariates protective, multiple observations update params,
  failure_probability monotone with horizon, warmup gate, hazard_at
  monotonicity, Config default values, model reset, predict output
  includes timestamp, high risk classification, observation_count.

tantivy_reindex.rs (~300 new lines):
- ReindexConfig: default values, custom construction, validation.
- ReindexProgress: field tracking, percentage calculation.
- ReindexResult: success/failure/partial construction and field access.

watchdog.rs (~15 lines changed):
- Minor test adjustments for watchdog timing assertions.

proptest_bloom_filter.rs (~215 new lines):
- Idempotent insert: double insert preserves containment.
- Double clear: idempotent on empty filter.
- Union self: A U A preserves all items from A.
- Union no-false-negatives: both source sets found after union.
- Counting double insert/remove: requires matching remove count.
- Counting clear+reuse: fresh insertions work after clear.
- Fill ratio monotone: non-decreasing with insertions.
- Theoretical FP rate monotone with item count.
- Memory always positive for any capacity/fp_rate.
- BloomStats Clone preserves all fields.
- Fixed non-ASCII characters in comments (∪ → U) for portability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
